Bug / Task Description: The reservoir sampler can choose a replacement slot index equal to the reservoir capacity, which is out of range for the backing storage (valid slots are 0..cap-1). This both skews the replacement probability and risks an out-of-bounds access when the chosen index equals the capacity. Fix the inclusion/replacement check so the index stays strictly within the reservoir's capacity.
Commit Subject: fix(sample): reservoir replacement index must stay within capacity
